name: Icebox Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and sugars until well blended.
2. Add the eggs and almond extract, then beat until light and fluffy.
3. Sift together the flour, soda, cinnamon, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture and mix well.
5. Stir in the chopped pecans.
6. Shape the dough into 3 or 4 rolls, each about 2 inches in diameter.
7. Wrap each roll individually in waxed paper.
8. Chill the rolls for several hours (they can be refrigerated for several weeks or frozen for several months).
9. When ready to bake, cut the cookies about 1/4 inch thick.
10. Bake on a greased cookie sheet for 8 to 10 minutes in a 400°F oven.
11. Yields 6 to 8 dozen.
Enjoy!
